issues.description: FlipLife is incorrect for this effect. The card looks at Life cards, places 1 on top of deck, and returns rest to Life area. This requires SearchDeck (to place card on deck) or a custom action. FlipLife specifically means converting Life cards to hand, which is not the effect here.
Effect is missing the core mechanic: selecting 1 Life card to place on top of deck while returning others to Life area. Current DSL does not capture the deck placement or the reordering aspect.
